entities.context: the Staffs comment has been restated below in its entirety, followed by the Companys response

entities.context: Form 10-K for Fiscal Year Ended December 31, 2023

entities.name: 8-K 2024-05-02 Organon (May Form 8-K)

attributes.description: Q1 2024 earnings release; Exhibit 99.1 Table 4 Non-GAAP reconciliation

entities.context: Current Report on Form 8-K filed May 2, 2024 (the May Form 8-K)

entities.name: Kirke Weaver
entities.context: cc: Kirke Weaver\nGeneral Counsel and Corporate Secretary

entities.name: Non-GAAP presentation non-compliance with Reg G / C&DI 102.10 (Table 4, Form 8-K May 2, 2024)

attributes.sec_rule: Regulation G; Non-GAAP C&DI Question 102.10(a) and (c)
attributes.resolution: Company will revise Table 4 presentation to separate each non-GAAP reconciliation in future filings; will include GAAP gross profit in future 10-Q/10-K

entities.context: the updated presentation continues to include most of the line items and subtotals found in your GAAP income statement and adds a measure of gross profit not found in your Form 10-Q ... please remove this presentation from future filings or alternatively explain to us in detail how this presentation complies with the guidance in Question 102.10(a) and (c) of the C&DIs for Non-GAAP Financial Measures

entities.name: Inadequate disclosure of spin-related and manufacturing network costs in earnings releases

attributes.resolution: Company committed to provide further description and quantification of spin-related and manufacturing network costs within footnotes of earnings releases

entities.context: As previously discussed in our response dated May 14, 2024 to Comment 5, the Company will provide a further description and quantification of the spin-related and manufacturing network costs within the footnotes of our earnings releases.

entities.name: Merck & Co., Inc.
entities.context: Spin-related costs include costs from the separation of Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, NJ, US.
